svg.aria-label: CocoIndex Enterprise — built for enterprise scale. Four headline stats for PB-scale incremental indexing: PB corpus scale incrementally indexed (coral), 10× fewer LLM embedding calls vs. full recompute (yellow), 100% lineage coverage with every byte traceable (mint), Δ only the delta always (sky). Below, a wide 50×8 corpus matrix of 400 dim tiles represents a petabyte-scale store where a single coral Δ slice of 8 tiles re-runs while the other 99.9% stays cached. Keywords: enterprise RAG, petabyte-scale indexing, incremental compute, delta-only, lineage, parallel chunking, zero-copy, failure isolation.
svg.title: CocoIndex Enterprise · Built for enterprise scale (light)
svg.desc: Light-theme enterprise banner: gradient title, 4 stat tiles (PB coral · 10× amber · 100% emerald · Δ indigo) with captions, and a 50×8 corpus matrix where only a single brand-coral Δ column of 8 tiles re-runs while 99.9% stays cached. Recolored for white GitHub READMEs — every token clears WCAG AA on #ffffff, palette mapped identically to the other light heroes (coral #BE5133 · amber #B45309 · peach #E59A63 · emerald #16A534 · indigo #2563EB · ink #2A121B).
svg.text: Built for enterprise scale — petabyte incremental indexing.
PB-SCALE · Δ ONLY · 100% LINEAGE · NO RE-COMPUTE
Only the Δ is reprocessed — the other 99.9% stays cached. Production-ready at petabyte scale.
